title: Chouchou Refuses to Abandon the Shop
description: On pages 16–19, Chouchou’s loyalty to the pet food shop turns Buggy’s occupation from a pirate threat into a personal wound for the town.
scene: Chouchou refuses to give up the place connected to his owner, while pirates and bystanders react to the dog’s stubborn defense.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Captain Buggy is pretty worked up...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You guys stirred up a real hornets' nest.

dialogue.speaker: Chouchou
dialogue.text: Hey, what's with the weird costume?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: MAYBE YOU THINK YOU'RE SAFE IN THAT CAGE...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: IF SO, THEN YOU REALLY DON'T KNOW WHO I AM...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: THERE'S NOT ANIMAL ALIVE THAT I CAN'T CONTROL.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I can even control that multi.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You're just a no- body thief...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: NOW TELL ME WHERE RORONOA ZOLO IS.

dialogue.speaker: Chouchou
dialogue.text: Nobody could survive that. Well, serves him right.

dialogue.speaker: Chouchou
dialogue.text: C'mon, Richie, let's go find RORONOA Zolo.

dialogue.speaker: Chouchou
dialogue.text: Killing him will give our repu- tattoo a big boost.

summary: This part makes the conflict emotional: Luffy sees that Buggy’s violence is not abstract, but aimed at things people love and protect.
